title: How accessible will Latvia's upcoming elections be?
summary_full: The right to vote is a fundamental right of a citizen in a democratic country. However, exercising this right is not always so easy for people with disabilities.
summary_public: The right to vote is a fundamental right of a citizen in a democratic country. However, exercising this right is not always so easy for people with disabilities.

LV.label: positive
